items.title: ‘The fiscal trajectory is not sustainable’: CBO warns about the highest debt in U.S. history as Trump adds $1.4 trillion to 10-year deficit
items.description: The national debt is set to surpass the historical high of 106% of GDP that it reached in 1946 by 2030, according to the CBO.

items.title: BlackRock offers DeFi trading for the first time, buys Uniswap tokens
items.description: The tie-up, which also relies on the crypto firm Securitize, is the first of its kind between Wall Street and Defi.

items.title: The 4 step approach Google’s AI boss used to return the tech giant to a ‘golden era’ of innovation
items.description: Also: All the news and watercooler chat from Fortune.

items.title: Bitcoin demand in Nancy Guthrie disappearance shows how crypto is becoming a more frequent feature of physical crimes
items.description: TMZ and an Arizona news outlet reported receiving the ransom letter.

items.title: Crypto crime-fighting startup TRM Labs notches $1 billion valuation with new $70 million funding round
items.description: With its blockchain analytics tools, TRM Labs helps private companies and agencies like the FBI track illicit finance.
